brief_html: This is sent by the host every 30 seconds to make sure that the Client is still responsive. The Client should respond with C>S 0x46 W3GS_PONG_TO_HOST.
remarks_html: This is sent by the host every 30 seconds to make sure that the Client is still responsive. The Client should respond with C>S 0x46 W3GS_PONG_TO_HOST.
